# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Data processing script with temporary files

TEMP_FILE="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"
PROCESSED_FILE="/tmp/myapp-$$-processed.tmp"
RESULTS_FILE="/tmp/myapp-$$-results.tmp"

# Generate sample data
echo "Generating initial data..."
cat > "$TEMP_FILE" << EOF
user1,100,active
user2,250,inactive
user3,175,active
user4,320,active
user5,90,inactive
EOF

# Process data - extract active users
echo "Processing data..."
grep "active" "$TEMP_FILE" > "$PROCESSED_FILE"

# Calculate statistics
echo "Calculating results..."
awk -F',' '{sum+=$2; count++} END {print "Total Active Users: " count; print "Total Value: " sum; print "Average: " sum/count}' "$PROCESSED_FILE" > "$RESULTS_FILE"

# Display results
echo "Results:"
cat "$RESULTS_FILE"

# Additional processing - sort by value
echo -e "\nTop active users by value:"
sort -t',' -k2 -nr "$PROCESSED_FILE" | head -3

# Update temp file with new data
echo "user6,400,active" >> "$TEMP_FILE"
echo "user7,150,active" >> "$TEMP_FILE"

# Reprocess with updated data
grep "active" "$TEMP_FILE" > "$PROCESSED_FILE"

# Generate final report
echo -e "\nFinal Statistics:"
awk -F',' '{sum+=$2; count++} END {print "Total: " count " users, Value: " sum}' "$PROCESSED_FILE"

# Write final output
cat "$PROCESSED_FILE" > "$RESULTS_FILE"

echo -e "\nProcessing complete. Results stored in $RESULTS_FILE"
